modmenu.descriptionTranslation.veinmine_: The relocated Enchanted UI framework bundled internally with Vein Mine.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.veinmine_bund: A relocated EUI for Vein Mine.
vm.config.use_hold_instead_of_toggle.too: Hold key to activate instead of toggling
vm.config.screen.title: Vein Mine Config
vm.config.server_managed.tooltip: This option is managed by the server
vm.config.translation_note:
§7The translation may not be 100% accurate. 
If you have any suggestions, please give us feedback.
Want to help translate this mod? Contribute on GitHub or contact us!
vm.config.search_radius.tooltip:
Range mode search radius
1 means 8 blocks in all directions
plus 9 blocks in each layer and the center block
vm.config.ignored_blocks.tooltip:
Blocks ignored in chain search
Format: namespace:path
vm.config.use_bfs.tooltip:
Enable or disable chain search
If disabled, range search will be used for all blocks
vm.config.use_radius_search.tooltip:
Enable or disable range search
If disabled, range search will not be used
vm.config.use_radius_search_when_reach_b: Switch to range search when 'Chain Limit' is reached
vm.config.distinguish_crop_maturity.tool: Only match crops with the same mature or immature state
Only match dyed blocks of the same color
vm.config.distinguish_deepslate_ores.too: Only match ores of the same variant (normal or deepslate)
vm.config.bridge_one_block_gap.tooltip: Allow vein mining to bridge one-block gaps between matching blocks
vm.warn.breakthroughs: Tool is about to break. Vein mining stopped.
vm.config.protect_tools.tooltip: Stop vein mining before tool breaks
vm.config.protected_tools.tooltip:
Tools that trigger protection
Format: namespace:path
vm.config.protect_allValuable_tools.tool: Protect gold, diamond, and netherite tools by default
vm.config.renderTime.tooltip: More passes improve visibility but reduce performance
vm.config.highlight_blocks_message.toolt: Show how many blocks will be broken
vm.config.useIntrusiveCode.tooltip:
Enabling this option will activate dedicated RenderType and RenderPipeline to render highlight outlines.
If it causes crashes or invisible highlights, please disable this option.
Changing this setting requires restarting the game to take effect.

When disabled, highlights will not be visible through blocks.
vm.config.open_keybindings.tooltip: Edit keys in the game settings
vm.command.reload_failed: An error occurred when reloading config. See Console for details
vm.config.keybinds.combination.tooltip: Click and press keys to set a new binding
vm.config.screen.least_characters: This entry must be at least %d characters.
vm.config.unsaved.title: Discard unsaved changes?
vm.config.unsaved.message: Your configuration changes have not been saved.
vm.config.screem.reset_message: All settings have been reset to their default values.
